rulings.Case Title: CARLOS FIGUEROA VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK, F.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 16, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend as to all causes of action referenced in Judge Kahn's oct-25-2011 order and cause of action for declaratory relief. Sustain with leave to amend as cause of action for quiet title and recission. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 16, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Motion For Entry Of Judgment>. Grant, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)
